name: Scope 3 upstream GHG emissions
businessDefinition:
Indirect (gross) scope 3 greenhouse gas emissions from activities related to the production and distribution of goods and services purchased by the reporting company (equity share approach preferably used). See also (EU) 2016/1011 Annex III (1)(e)(iii).
Linked to Regulation (EU) 2022/1288, Annex I, Table 1, Adverse sustainability indicators 1, 2, 3
